territorio.label: Territory
territorio.title: The origin
territorio.text: Castile: land of contrasts and character. A landscape that shapes the way of seeing, creating and living. From here, Cavero Diego translates that spirit into objects and materials born from criteria, not trends.

manifiesto.label: Manifesto
manifiesto.text: Cavero Diego represents a contemporary way of understanding our heritage through sobriety, culture and precision. It's Castilian pride reinterpreted without nostalgia; a brand rooted in tradition, but expressed with international language.

cc.title:
First
row.
cc.desc: No noise, no rush. When there's something to tell — a launch, a piece, a moment — you'll be the first to know.
cc.success_desc: We'll let you know when there's something worth knowing.
cc.cta_desc: Stories, processes and launches. No noise.

empresas.hero_desc: Hotels, restaurants, hospitality spaces and companies that want to offer their customers something different. We work with volumes from 10 units and close custom commercial agreements.
empresas.uso1_desc: Room amenities, welcome details and daily-use products that reinforce your space's identity.
empresas.uso2_desc: Table candles, ambiance enhancers and objects that complete the sensory experience of the gastronomic space.
empresas.uso3_desc: Client details, employee welcome kits and company gifts with their own identity.
empresas.ventaja1: Artisanal manufacturing in Castile, without outsourcing the process.
empresas.ventaja2: Raw materials of natural and documented origin.
empresas.ventaja3: Possibility of discreet customization: packaging, fragrance or engraving.
empresas.ventaja4: Tiered pricing by volume, without abusive minimums.
empresas.ventaja5: Delivery within agreed timeframes with sufficient margin for planning.
empresas.ventaja6: Single point of contact throughout the entire process.
empresas.paso1_desc: Tell us what you need, for which space and in what timeframe. No commitment.
empresas.paso2_desc: We send you a selection of products, volume pricing and customization options.
empresas.paso3_desc: Before confirming the order, you can receive a sample of the final product.
empresas.paso4_desc: We produce and ship within the agreed timeframe. Direct tracking at all times.
empresas.contacto_desc: We respond within 48 hours. If the project fits, we'll arrange a call to fine-tune the details.
empresas.contacto_direct: Or write to us directly at
empresas.form_mensaje: What do you have in mind?
empresas.form_mensaje_placeholder: Tell us the context, the product you're interested in or any relevant details.
empresas.form_legal: Your data is used only to respond to your inquiry.
empresas.form_success_desc:
We'll respond within 48 hours.
Thank you for trusting Cavero Diego.
